response.text:

rationale: r1c2's SoC (0.31) is below your share threshold (0.35) and urgency is normal; your generous policy and critical neighborhood distress justify immediate allocation to stabilize vulnerable peers.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=generous, share_min_soc_frac=0.35, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: Neighborhood is in critical cascading distress with 8 peers at 0.20–0.24 SoC; I must share aggressively via dr_aggregator to stabilize the most vulnerable while preserving my own survival margin..
